TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_pinangan_no_'Amis, title = O_pinangan_no_'Amis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_pinangan_no_'Amis} }

S.FORM: == O pinangan no 'Amis == :U Pinangan atu Nanaman nu 'Amis Nanu tu'as nu 'Amis awaay ku tilid, dengan u mata, u tanginga, u kamay, u wa'ay atu falucu' nu tamdaw ku mafana'ay. Saka, adihay ku mafalahay a serangawan tu nanuliteng. Iti:ya ho, ira ku cayay pipapaysu a pitilidan nu 'Amis, tudung kasa'upuan nu finawlan—Sefi(Talu'an), dadayatu ira ku mirumruman nu mi'afatay a slal a namal. Sa'upu'upu sa palitemek tu aru' ku masaslalay; ira ku mikituhay, ira ku mitulikay, ira ku miwikwikay atu mikaeitay tu tafukud. Ci falucu'ay tamdaw pasa tengil pasa nengneng sa itatihi tu dadayadaya, cila fana' satu. Anu eca i, tatuy tu ccay a talid tayra sa i luma'nu cima a matu'asay patuitu minanam, tahira kafana'an, caay pisaeli tu paysu.Mahaenay ku pinangan nu 'Amis a ka'uripan. Adihay ku kaulahan afangcalay pinangan nu matu'asay, anu ha^min han sumuwal caay ku mamafilu. Anini haccaccay han aku pasadak tayra ka^minan nu pitilidan. Saki Kaen Iti:yaho, 'alu:man ku paru nu ccay laluma'an, sadaken ku hemay a miteli i tapila', u dateng sadaken misilsil i tipid kanca ira ku talingafuh hananay misanga'an a palu', patenas han i lawac nu dateng. Taliyoksa masa'irawraw ku kateli nu dating atu kamaru' nu tamdaw. U matu'asay, fafahiyan atu kaemangay wawa manga'ay ci 'anengang mitahka; u kapah atu cacumikay tamdaw ma^min mahakakan. Anu mikuhaw, kakuy han ku siuy a mihelup, caka^ca pasunien ku pikuhaw, nawhani, caay kalecad ku pinanum atu pikuhaw. Ya awaho ku pingsiyang冰箱) i, hatiniay tu ka'aluman nu paru nu luma', mipacuk satu, tansul tu mipili'ku citudungay tu malu sasirawen, nawhani caay ka lecad ku kamay nu tamdaw itini a mahapinang. Uruma padeteng micirah tu kulang, tefu', cahid, kudasing, paenu' nu facidul…malu sapatala tu sa'upu nu salawinawina. Maherek mi'anip tu kasienawan, maedeng i saka 4 tahira i kapanayan saka 6 fulad, mifuting ku fa'inayan, tu dadaya mipsalil tu kakahongay(kuwaw), lafii minukay. Ta dafak caho ka taengad makanirtu pacefung i riyar a mipataruh tu tiked, maala ku fuwa, pakaala uluma tu kaciki atu cilinayay a futing. Itiyaho, tanu tamdaw han a mikadut, wa:ta ku ruray, saka, awa ku makahiay nu Payrang a tamdaw mikadafu tayni i 'Amis. Ya maalaay futing ma^min tapayen misa'id'id, matatudungtu paruen I cayna ta tating han i 'anungnung nu laluma'an, matakawaw nu takaraway a 'edu. Unian malecad tu saka tusa malu sapatala tu sa'upu. Saki Ngudu Nanuemangan ho ma^mintu mapalimu'ut tu suwal ku wawa nu Pangcah hananay,saka, pakinali ku kalangudu kangida' nu Pangcah a tamdaw. Anu ira ku lafang taynu luma'misalama, maupuh mipa'icup mipanamal, mahrek i, anu udafak, caka^ca milicay "Maranam tu kisu?", anu u dadaya "malafitu kisu?" sanay a salicay. Itira i lalan rumakat, ma'araw ku ci'inurungay tu karetengay a matu'asay, tansul a micaliw tu 'inurung caay ka palimu'uten. Saki Salama Tuna micamul ku Pangcah tu 'urip nu Holam, dengan unian ku kafukilan. Nawhani, nanuemangan mikilutuk, miki'alu^, mikiriyar; icuwa ku malawaay nu Pangcah. Saka malahaklungho tu Pangcah misalama awatu ma'araw ku kurur, ira patikul masataftaf tu ku pinatatuy. Anu talalutuk, u dating, dungec, kacumuli…ku maalaay, tala 'alu mikilim tu mamaala, tala riyar caka^ca mikilim tu kakiskisen tahira pinukayan nu kaput. Ira ku suwal nu ruma a fincadan, "Anu misalama tayra i palapalaan i, haklungen:itu ku Pangcah a tamdaw, hay^ca ka cahiw, ta minukay satu adihay ku sapaterung tu iluma'ay" saan.
S.PHON: == o~u pinaŋan no~u ʡamis == :o~u~u pinaŋan ato~u~u nanaman no~u~u ʡamis nano~u~u to~u~uʡas no~u~u ʡamis awaaj ko~u~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~u mata, o~u~u taŋiŋa, o~u~u kamaj, o~u~u waʡaj ato~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u mafanaʡaj. saka, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u mafaɾaħaj a səraŋawan to~u~u nano~u~uɾitəŋ. iti:ja ħo~u, ira ko~u~u ʦajaj pipapajso~u~u a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u~u ʡamis, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uan no~u~u finawɾan*səfi(taɾo~u~uʡan), ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajato~u~u ira ko~u~u miro~u~umro~u~uman no~u~u miʡafataj a sɾaɾ a namaɾ. saʡo~u~upo~u~uʡo~u~upo~u~u sa paɾitəmək to~u~u aro~u~uʡ ko~u~u masasɾaɾaj; ira ko~u~u mikito~u~uħaj, ira ko~u~u mito~u~uɾikaj, ira ko~u~u miwikwikaj ato~u~u mikaəitaj to~u~u tafo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ. ʦi faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw pasa təŋiɾ pasa nəŋnəŋ sa itatiħi to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja, ʦiɾa fanaʡ sato~u~u. ano~u~u əʦa i, tato~u~uj to~u~u ʦʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ tajra sa i ɾo~u~umaʡno~u~u ʦima a mato~u~uʡasaj pato~u~uito~u~u minanam, taħira kafanaʡan, ʦaaj pisaəɾi to~u~u pajso~u~u.maħaənaj ko~u~u pinaŋan no~u~u ʡamis a kaʡo~u~uripan. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kao~u~uɾaħan afaŋʦaɾaj pinaŋan no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, ano~u~u ħaʔmin ħan so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ ʦaaj ko~u~u mamafiɾo~u~u. anini ħaʦʦaʦʦaj ħan ako~u~u pasaɬ~ɮak tajra kaʔminan no~u~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. saki kaən iti:jaħo~u, ʡaɾo~u~u:man ko~u~u paro~u~u no~u~u ʦʦaj ɾaɾo~u~umaʡan, saɬ~ɮakən ko~u~u ħəmaj a mitəɾi i tapiɾaʡ, o~u~u ɬ~ɮatəŋ saɬ~ɮakən misiɾsiɾ i tipiɬ~ɮ kanʦa ira ko~u~u taɾiŋafo~u~uħ ħananaj misaŋaʡan a paɾo~u~uʡ, patənas ħan i ɾawaʦ no~u~u ɬ~ɮatəŋ. taɾijo~uksa masaʡirawraw ko~u~u katəɾi no~u~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ ato~u~u kamaro~u~uʡ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, fafaħijan ato~u~u kaəmaŋaj wawa maŋaʡaj ʦi ʡanəŋaŋ mitaħka; o~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u ʦaʦo~u~umikaj tamɬ~ɮaw maʔmin maħakakan. ano~u~u miko~u~uħaw, kako~u~uj ħan ko~u~u sio~u~uj a miħəɾo~u~up, ʦakaʔʦa paso~u~uniən ko~u~u piko~u~uħaw, nawħani, ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u pinano~u~um ato~u~u piko~u~uħaw. ja awaħo~u ko~u~u piŋsijaŋ**) i, ħatiniaj to~u~u kaʡaɾo~u~uman no~u~u paro~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, mipaʦo~u~uk sato~u~u, tanso~u~uɾ to~u~u mipiɾiʡko~u~u ʦito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u maɾo~u~u sasirawən, nawħani ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kamaj no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini a maħapinaŋ. o~u~uro~u~uma paɬ~ɮətəŋ miʦiraħ to~u~u ko~u~uɾaŋ, təfo~u~uʡ, ʦaħiɬ~ɮ, ko~u~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, paəno~u~uʡ no~u~u faʦiɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ*maɾo~u~u sapataɾa to~u~u saʡo~u~upo~u~u no~u~u saɾawinawina. maħərək miʡanip to~u~u kasiənawan, maəɬ~ɮəŋ i saka * taħira i kapanajan saka * fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mifo~u~utiŋ ko~u~u faʡinajan, to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mipsaɾiɾ to~u~u kakaħo~uŋaj(ko~u~uwaw), ɾafii mino~u~ukaj. ta ɬ~ɮafak ʦaħo~u ka taəŋaɬ~ɮ makanirto~u~u paʦəfo~u~uŋ i rijar a mipataro~u~uħ to~u~u tikəɬ~ɮ, maaɾa ko~u~u fo~u~uwa, pakaaɾa o~u~uɾo~u~uma to~u~u kaʦiki ato~u~u ʦiɾinajaj a fo~u~utiŋ. itijaħo~u, tano~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħan a mikaɬ~ɮo~u~ut, wa:ta ko~u~u ro~u~uraj, saka, awa ko~u~u makaħiaj no~u~u pajraŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~u tajni i ʡamis. ja maaɾaaj fo~u~utiŋ maʔmin tapajən misaʡiɬ~ɮʡiɬ~ɮ, matato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋto~u~u paro~u~uən i ʦajna ta tatiŋ ħan i ʡano~u~uŋno~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾaɾo~u~umaʡan, matakawaw no~u~u takarawaj a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u~u. o~u~unian maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u saka to~u~usa maɾo~u~u sapataɾa to~u~u saʡo~u~upo~u~u. saki ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u nano~u~uəmaŋan ħo~u maʔminto~u~u mapaɾimo~u~uʡo~u~ut to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ko~u~u wawa no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj,saka, pakinaɾi ko~u~u kaɾaŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u kaŋiɬ~ɮaʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u ira ko~u~u ɾafaŋ tajno~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡmisaɾama, mao~u~upo~u~uħ mipaʡiʦo~u~up mipanamaɾ, maħrək i, ano~u~u o~u~uɬ~ɮafak, ʦakaʔʦa miɾiʦaj "maranam to~u~u kiso~u~u?", ano~u~u o~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja "maɾafito~u~u kiso~u~u?" sanaj a saɾiʦaj. itira i ɾaɾan ro~u~umakat, maʡaraw ko~u~u ʦiʡino~u~uro~u~uŋaj to~u~u karətəŋaj a mato~u~uʡasaj, tanso~u~uɾ a miʦaɾiw to~u~u ʡino~u~uro~u~uŋ ʦaaj ka paɾimo~u~uʡo~u~utən. saki saɾama to~u~una miʦamo~u~uɾ ko~u~u paŋʦaħ to~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u ħo~uɾam, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~unian ko~u~u kafo~u~ukiɾan. nawħani, nano~u~uəmaŋan mikiɾo~u~uto~u~uk, mikiʡaɾo~u~uʔ, mikirijar; iʦo~u~uwa ko~u~u maɾawaaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ. saka maɾaħakɾo~u~uŋħo~u to~u~u paŋʦaħ misaɾama awato~u~u maʡaraw ko~u~u ko~u~uro~u~ur, ira patiko~u~uɾ masataftaf to~u~u ko~u~u pinatato~u~uj. ano~u~u taɾaɾo~u~uto~u~uk, o~u~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋəʦ, kaʦo~u~umo~u~uɾi*ko~u~u maaɾaaj, taɾa ʡaɾo~u~u mikiɾim to~u~u mamaaɾa, taɾa rijar ʦakaʔʦa mikiɾim to~u~u kakiskisən taħira pino~u~ukajan no~u~u kapo~u~ut. ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ro~u~uma a finʦaɬ~ɮan, "ano~u~u misaɾama tajra i paɾapaɾaan i, ħakɾo~u~uŋən:ito~u~u ko~u~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ħajʔʦa ka ʦaħiw, ta mino~u~ukaj sato~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sapatəro~u~uŋ to~u~u iɾo~u~umaʡaj" saan.
S.FORM: == O pinangan no 'Amis == :U Pinangan atu Nanaman nu 'Amis Nanu tu'as nu 'Amis awaay ku tilid, dengan u mata, u tanginga, u kamay, u wa'ay atu falucu' nu tamdaw ku mafana'ay. Saka, adihay ku mafalahay a serangawan tu nanuliteng. Iti:ya ho, ira ku cayay pipapaysu a pitilidan nu 'Amis, tudung kasa'upuan nu finawlan—Sefi(Talu'an), dadayatu ira ku mirumruman nu mi'afatay a slal a namal. Sa'upu'upu sa palitemek tu aru' ku masaslalay; ira ku mikituhay, ira ku mitulikay, ira ku miwikwikay atu mikaeitay tu tafukud. Ci falucu'ay tamdaw pasa tengil pasa nengneng sa itatihi tu dadayadaya, cila fana' satu. Anu eca i, tatuy tu ccay a talid tayra sa i luma'nu cima a matu'asay patuitu minanam, tahira kafana'an, caay pisaeli tu paysu.Mahaenay ku pinangan nu 'Amis a ka'uripan. Adihay ku kaulahan afangcalay pinangan nu matu'asay, anu ha^min han sumuwal caay ku mamafilu. Anini haccaccay han aku pasadak tayra ka^minan nu pitilidan. Saki Kaen Iti:yaho, 'alu:man ku paru nu ccay laluma'an, sadaken ku hemay a miteli i tapila', u dateng sadaken misilsil i tipid kanca ira ku talingafuh hananay misanga'an a palu', patenas han i lawac nu dateng. Taliyoksa masa'irawraw ku kateli nu dating atu kamaru' nu tamdaw. U matu'asay, fafahiyan atu kaemangay wawa manga'ay ci 'anengang mitahka; u kapah atu cacumikay tamdaw ma^min mahakakan. Anu mikuhaw, kakuy han ku siuy a mihelup, caka^ca pasunien ku pikuhaw, nawhani, caay kalecad ku pinanum atu pikuhaw. Ya awaho ku pingsiyang冰箱) i, hatiniay tu ka'aluman nu paru nu luma', mipacuk satu, tansul tu mipili'ku citudungay tu malu sasirawen, nawhani caay ka lecad ku kamay nu tamdaw itini a mahapinang. Uruma padeteng micirah tu kulang, tefu', cahid, kudasing, paenu' nu facidul…malu sapatala tu sa'upu nu salawinawina. Maherek mi'anip tu kasienawan, maedeng i saka 4 tahira i kapanayan saka 6 fulad, mifuting ku fa'inayan, tu dadaya mipsalil tu kakahongay(kuwaw), lafii minukay. Ta dafak caho ka taengad makanirtu pacefung i riyar a mipataruh tu tiked, maala ku fuwa, pakaala uluma tu kaciki atu cilinayay a futing. Itiyaho, tanu tamdaw han a mikadut, wa:ta ku ruray, saka, awa ku makahiay nu Payrang a tamdaw mikadafu tayni i 'Amis. Ya maalaay futing ma^min tapayen misa'id'id, matatudungtu paruen I cayna ta tating han i 'anungnung nu laluma'an, matakawaw nu takaraway a 'edu. Unian malecad tu saka tusa malu sapatala tu sa'upu. Saki Ngudu Nanuemangan ho ma^mintu mapalimu'ut tu suwal ku wawa nu Pangcah hananay,saka, pakinali ku kalangudu kangida' nu Pangcah a tamdaw. Anu ira ku lafang taynu luma'misalama, maupuh mipa'icup mipanamal, mahrek i, anu udafak, caka^ca milicay "Maranam tu kisu?", anu u dadaya "malafitu kisu?" sanay a salicay. Itira i lalan rumakat, ma'araw ku ci'inurungay tu karetengay a matu'asay, tansul a micaliw tu 'inurung caay ka palimu'uten. Saki Salama Tuna micamul ku Pangcah tu 'urip nu Holam, dengan unian ku kafukilan. Nawhani, nanuemangan mikilutuk, miki'alu^, mikiriyar; icuwa ku malawaay nu Pangcah. Saka malahaklungho tu Pangcah misalama awatu ma'araw ku kurur, ira patikul masataftaf tu ku pinatatuy. Anu talalutuk, u dating, dungec, kacumuli…ku maalaay, tala 'alu mikilim tu mamaala, tala riyar caka^ca mikilim tu kakiskisen tahira pinukayan nu kaput. Ira ku suwal nu ruma a fincadan, "Anu misalama tayra i palapalaan i, haklungen:itu ku Pangcah a tamdaw, hay^ca ka cahiw, ta minukay satu adihay ku sapaterung tu iluma'ay" saan.
S.PHON: == o~u pinaŋan no~u ʡamis == :o~u~u pinaŋan ato~u~u nanaman no~u~u ʡamis nano~u~u to~u~uʡas no~u~u ʡamis awaaj ko~u~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~u mata, o~u~u taŋiŋa, o~u~u kamaj, o~u~u waʡaj ato~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u mafanaʡaj. saka, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u mafaɾaħaj a səraŋawan to~u~u nano~u~uɾitəŋ. iti:ja ħo~u, ira ko~u~u ʦajaj pipapajso~u~u a pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u~u ʡamis, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uan no~u~u finawɾan*səfi(taɾo~u~uʡan), ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajato~u~u ira ko~u~u miro~u~umro~u~uman no~u~u miʡafataj a sɾaɾ a namaɾ. saʡo~u~upo~u~uʡo~u~upo~u~u sa paɾitəmək to~u~u aro~u~uʡ ko~u~u masasɾaɾaj; ira ko~u~u mikito~u~uħaj, ira ko~u~u mito~u~uɾikaj, ira ko~u~u miwikwikaj ato~u~u mikaəitaj to~u~u tafo~u~uko~u~uɬ~ɮ. ʦi faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw pasa təŋiɾ pasa nəŋnəŋ sa itatiħi to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja, ʦiɾa fanaʡ sato~u~u. ano~u~u əʦa i, tato~u~uj to~u~u ʦʦaj a taɾiɬ~ɮ tajra sa i ɾo~u~umaʡno~u~u ʦima a mato~u~uʡasaj pato~u~uito~u~u minanam, taħira kafanaʡan, ʦaaj pisaəɾi to~u~u pajso~u~u.maħaənaj ko~u~u pinaŋan no~u~u ʡamis a kaʡo~u~uripan. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kao~u~uɾaħan afaŋʦaɾaj pinaŋan no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, ano~u~u ħaʔmin ħan so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ ʦaaj ko~u~u mamafiɾo~u~u. anini ħaʦʦaʦʦaj ħan ako~u~u pasaɬ~ɮak tajra kaʔminan no~u~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. saki kaən iti:jaħo~u, ʡaɾo~u~u:man ko~u~u paro~u~u no~u~u ʦʦaj ɾaɾo~u~umaʡan, saɬ~ɮakən ko~u~u ħəmaj a mitəɾi i tapiɾaʡ, o~u~u ɬ~ɮatəŋ saɬ~ɮakən misiɾsiɾ i tipiɬ~ɮ kanʦa ira ko~u~u taɾiŋafo~u~uħ ħananaj misaŋaʡan a paɾo~u~uʡ, patənas ħan i ɾawaʦ no~u~u ɬ~ɮatəŋ. taɾijo~uksa masaʡirawraw ko~u~u katəɾi no~u~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ ato~u~u kamaro~u~uʡ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj, fafaħijan ato~u~u kaəmaŋaj wawa maŋaʡaj ʦi ʡanəŋaŋ mitaħka; o~u~u kapaħ ato~u~u ʦaʦo~u~umikaj tamɬ~ɮaw maʔmin maħakakan. ano~u~u miko~u~uħaw, kako~u~uj ħan ko~u~u sio~u~uj a miħəɾo~u~up, ʦakaʔʦa paso~u~uniən ko~u~u piko~u~uħaw, nawħani, ʦaaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u pinano~u~um ato~u~u piko~u~uħaw. ja awaħo~u ko~u~u piŋsijaŋ**) i, ħatiniaj to~u~u kaʡaɾo~u~uman no~u~u paro~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, mipaʦo~u~uk sato~u~u, tanso~u~uɾ to~u~u mipiɾiʡko~u~u ʦito~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u maɾo~u~u sasirawən, nawħani ʦaaj ka ɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kamaj no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini a maħapinaŋ. o~u~uro~u~uma paɬ~ɮətəŋ miʦiraħ to~u~u ko~u~uɾaŋ, təfo~u~uʡ, ʦaħiɬ~ɮ, ko~u~uɬ~ɮasiŋ, paəno~u~uʡ no~u~u faʦiɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ*maɾo~u~u sapataɾa to~u~u saʡo~u~upo~u~u no~u~u saɾawinawina. maħərək miʡanip to~u~u kasiənawan, maəɬ~ɮəŋ i saka * taħira i kapanajan saka * fo~u~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mifo~u~utiŋ ko~u~u faʡinajan, to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja mipsaɾiɾ to~u~u kakaħo~uŋaj(ko~u~uwaw), ɾafii mino~u~ukaj. ta ɬ~ɮafak ʦaħo~u ka taəŋaɬ~ɮ makanirto~u~u paʦəfo~u~uŋ i rijar a mipataro~u~uħ to~u~u tikəɬ~ɮ, maaɾa ko~u~u fo~u~uwa, pakaaɾa o~u~uɾo~u~uma to~u~u kaʦiki ato~u~u ʦiɾinajaj a fo~u~utiŋ. itijaħo~u, tano~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ħan a mikaɬ~ɮo~u~ut, wa:ta ko~u~u ro~u~uraj, saka, awa ko~u~u makaħiaj no~u~u pajraŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~u tajni i ʡamis. ja maaɾaaj fo~u~utiŋ maʔmin tapajən misaʡiɬ~ɮʡiɬ~ɮ, matato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋto~u~u paro~u~uən i ʦajna ta tatiŋ ħan i ʡano~u~uŋno~u~uŋ no~u~u ɾaɾo~u~umaʡan, matakawaw no~u~u takarawaj a ʡəɬ~ɮo~u~u. o~u~unian maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u saka to~u~usa maɾo~u~u sapataɾa to~u~u saʡo~u~upo~u~u. saki ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u nano~u~uəmaŋan ħo~u maʔminto~u~u mapaɾimo~u~uʡo~u~ut to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ko~u~u wawa no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj,saka, pakinaɾi ko~u~u kaɾaŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u kaŋiɬ~ɮaʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u ira ko~u~u ɾafaŋ tajno~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡmisaɾama, mao~u~upo~u~uħ mipaʡiʦo~u~up mipanamaɾ, maħrək i, ano~u~u o~u~uɬ~ɮafak, ʦakaʔʦa miɾiʦaj "maranam to~u~u kiso~u~u?", ano~u~u o~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja "maɾafito~u~u kiso~u~u?" sanaj a saɾiʦaj. itira i ɾaɾan ro~u~umakat, maʡaraw ko~u~u ʦiʡino~u~uro~u~uŋaj to~u~u karətəŋaj a mato~u~uʡasaj, tanso~u~uɾ a miʦaɾiw to~u~u ʡino~u~uro~u~uŋ ʦaaj ka paɾimo~u~uʡo~u~utən. saki saɾama to~u~una miʦamo~u~uɾ ko~u~u paŋʦaħ to~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u ħo~uɾam, ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~unian ko~u~u kafo~u~ukiɾan. nawħani, nano~u~uəmaŋan mikiɾo~u~uto~u~uk, mikiʡaɾo~u~uʔ, mikirijar; iʦo~u~uwa ko~u~u maɾawaaj no~u~u paŋʦaħ. saka maɾaħakɾo~u~uŋħo~u to~u~u paŋʦaħ misaɾama awato~u~u maʡaraw ko~u~u ko~u~uro~u~ur, ira patiko~u~uɾ masataftaf to~u~u ko~u~u pinatato~u~uj. ano~u~u taɾaɾo~u~uto~u~uk, o~u~u ɬ~ɮatiŋ, ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋəʦ, kaʦo~u~umo~u~uɾi*ko~u~u maaɾaaj, taɾa ʡaɾo~u~u mikiɾim to~u~u mamaaɾa, taɾa rijar ʦakaʔʦa mikiɾim to~u~u kakiskisən taħira pino~u~ukajan no~u~u kapo~u~ut. ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u ro~u~uma a finʦaɬ~ɮan, "ano~u~u misaɾama tajra i paɾapaɾaan i, ħakɾo~u~uŋən:ito~u~u ko~u~u paŋʦaħ a tamɬ~ɮaw, ħajʔʦa ka ʦaħiw, ta mino~u~ukaj sato~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u sapatəro~u~uŋ to~u~u iɾo~u~umaʡaj" saan.
